data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. PAINT THE FENCE has a moderate overall strike-rate. Hit the board with a minor placing last time when second (17.41) at this track. One of the leading chances. 3. BLAZING GIRL found best form to win by one length at this track over 300m (17.42) in a Bottom Up - Grade 6. Has hit winning form and can measure up again. 1. SEMANTIC QUEEN turned in a fair 4th placed finish last time at this track over 300m (17.52). Likely to play a prominent role. 2. BLONDE MUSTANG will be thereabouts while fresh.","runners":[5,3,1,2],"exclusive":false}
